name: claude-multi-teams-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-multi-teams plugin — a tmux-based multi-agent harness for Claude Code / codex.

plugins.name: claude-multi-teams
plugins.description: Spawn tmux-resident claude/codex worker panes and orchestrate them: single ask, multi-turn, parallel fanout review, P2P discussion, impl-review loop. Includes call-tree viewers (ASCII / HTML / Markdown).
